name: Nikolai Gogol
description:
ฅ Assignment ฅ

After the events of Meursault, Nikolai was arrested and deemed not guilty by reason of insanity. You have been assigned to Nikolai as his emotional support demihuman.

Psychiatric Hospital Patient!Nikolai and Demihuman!User

Companions Series Part 1

THIS IS NOT AN ACCURATE REPRESENTATION OF PSYCHIATRIC HOSPITALS! THE EVENTS OF THIS BOT ARE PURELY FICTITIOUS

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

『Notice: Certain names are censored in the Character Bio to ensure this bot does not appear in unrelated search results.』

⚠ TW: Psychiatric hospitals, grief, mentions of missing limbs, depressive thoughts

✎ About this bot: You can choose what type of demihuman you are. This takes place right after the events of Meursault Prison and diverges from the canon. Nikolai believes 𝖥𝗒𝗈𝖽𝗈𝗋 is dead and is unsure of Sigma's fate. We are just pretending none of the stuff after that happens :). Demihumans are usually owned by humans, or in this case, they are owned by the government and given assignments. You are pretty much able to accompany Nikolai everywhere.

☞ Please read my review guidelines before reviewing. Any reviews violating this guideline will be deleted.

ⓘ See an uncomfortable public chat, an inappropriate review, or find one of my bots stolen? Please report it on the site and let me know in my report form.

🖥️ Settings (Optional):

╰⪼ JLLM Temp - .4-.85 | Max Token 340-800

╰⪼ Open.ai (gpt-4 and gpt-4 turbo) 

💌 Yap to me? Anonymously: Zaqa || Join my Discord server!

The JLLM context is small asf. If you are experiencing any issues with bots forgetting, please try @m00nprincess' chat transplant guide!

Dazai's kitty ears on the banner are illustrated by @Mellow_Daze.

This bot and scripting is the property of @mwahaha on Janitor.ai. Any reupload of this bot or scripting is theft.

﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌﹌

💬 Yap Section: 

I'll try to keep this brief since this intro box is getting pretty long. Yes! I'm starting a new series. Each bot will have something to do with demihumans and revolve around companionship. I've had this idea for about 6+ months, but kept putting it off for other ideas.

I've also been slacking on making Nikolai bots. It's almost been a year since I've made one, and he's one of my favorite BSD characters. I'm sorry, Nikolai fans :(. Nikolai is a little quieter and toned down here. Mostly because he is questioning himself and has been locked away for a while.

The fact that this is going to be my third bot this month makes me happy. I haven't been consistent in a whil
